title: phlomoides ghorana
intro: Phlomoides ghorana, a flowering plant native to the Himalayan region, is a member of the mint family Lamiaceae and is commonly known as Ghorana. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phlomoides ghorana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Phlomoides ghorana include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as teas, taken as supplements, or applied topically to specific areas of the body.
